name: Gov Opportunity Scout — KE software dev + US reconciliation

parameters.content:
## Gov Opportunity Scout
Two independent daily streams:
1. **Kenya** — government **software-development** tenders/RFPs/EOIs (national, county, parastatal).
2. **US** — **reconciliation** solicitations from **state & city** governments.

**100% open-source stack:** n8n (community) + SearXNG (search) + SMTP (alerts). No paid APIs.

### Setup (5 steps)
1. Run a **SearXNG** instance and enable the JSON API (in `settings.yml`: `search.formats: [html, json]`).
2. Set n8n env var **`SEARXNG_URL`** to its address (e.g. `https://searx.example.org`), or edit the fallback in the *build queries* nodes.
3. Open each **email digest** node → pick your **SMTP** credential, set from/to.
4. **Save**, then toggle the workflow **Active** (dedup memory only persists when active).
5. Adjust the cron in the **trigger** nodes if you want a different time/frequency.

### SearXNG note
These nodes call `GET {SEARXNG_URL}/search?...&format=json`.
If you get a 403, JSON format is disabled — enable it in SearXNG `settings.yml`.

Prefer a different engine? Swap the **SearXNG search** HTTP node for Brave/Google/Bing API
and keep the rest; just map results to `{title, url, content}` in *normalize*.

### Tune relevance & sources
• **build queries** node = the search strings (add portals, counties, states).
• **normalize & filter** node = the keyword sets (primary AND context, minus exclude).
• **dedup** keeps a 90-day memory of seen URLs per stream.
• The **No-Op** node is the extension point: add Slack, Telegram, Google Sheets,
  NocoDB or Baserow after it to log/notify.

### Legal / etiquette
Searches public portals only. Respect each site's robots.txt & terms,
keep the daily cadence gentle, and confirm every opportunity on the
official issuing portal before acting.
